title: coryphantha scolymoides
intro: Coryphantha scolymoides, also known as the little pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and to have antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coryphantha scolymoides include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and even lower blood pressure. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, and it is often harvested for its stems and flowers to make traditional medicine.
